description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult pedestrian with a casual urban appearance. The individual has a shoulder-length bob hairstyle and is dressed in a short-sleeve t-shirt featuring a printed graphic on the chest, paired with fitted pants and lace-up sneakers. The figure's arms are relaxed and slightly extended outward, and the posture is upright and neutral, suggesting a natural standing pose. The clothing is form-fitting and modern, suitable for everyday city environments such as sidewalks or parks. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the overall build is average, with realistic human proportions. The surface finish of the clothing and skin appears matte, with subtle textural details on the shoes and hair.
description: A casually dressed adult standing upright, wearing a graphic t-shirt, fitted pants, and sneakers, with a shoulder-length bob hairstyle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the graphic t-shirt, facial features, and relaxed arm position.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, hair, and the side seam of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, t-shirt, and pants, with both arms visible from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, hair, and the right side of the outfit.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeve t-shirt with a graphic print and fitted pants
